summary: Iteration 194: Verified all Progress tab fixes for Appeal Case Manager. All 3 user-reported issues have been resolved.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix #1 (Button Removal): VERIFIED - 'Build Arguments' and 'Build Submissions Draft' buttons completely removed from PipelineProgress.jsx. Only 9 buttons remain: Extract All Documents, Refresh Case Extract, Classify Issues, Verify Top 3, Verify Top 6, Sync Grounds, Refresh Pipeline Now, Refresh + Verify Top 3, Refresh + Verify Top 6.
Fix #2 (Heading Style): VERIFIED - Pipeline Progress heading changed from 'text-base text-slate-900' to 'text-xl text-blue-600' (bigger, bright blue). Confirmed in UI screenshot.

Fix #3 (Progress Export): VERIFIED - buildProgressHtml() completely rewritten in CaseDetail.jsx (lines 898-954). Export now includes: TOC (2-column grid with 5 sections), Case Summary, Case Readiness Score (from DOM via data-testid), Pipeline Summary (from DOM), AI Progress Analysis (with mdToHtml formatting), Appeal Checklist (from DOM). Header color changed to blue (#2563eb).
Code Quality: escHtml and mdToHtml helper functions added at component scope (lines 881-897) for proper HTML escaping and markdown conversion in exports.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 194 verified 3 Progress tab fixes: (1) Build Arguments and Build Submissions Draft buttons removed from PipelineProgress.jsx - no longer causing 500 errors. (2) Pipeline Progress heading now uses text-xl text-blue-600 for bigger, bright blue styling. (3) Progress export (PDF/Print/Word) now captures full on-screen content including TOC, Case Summary, Readiness Score, Pipeline Summary, AI Analysis, and Checklist with proper formatting. Test case: R v Homann (case_ba08d8e0ad0d). Export verified at /document-preview?mode=pdf showing 'Case Progress' title with blue header and 5-section TOC.
